options.name: --file
options.description: Specifies optional result output file path.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Specifies optional result output format
JSON,TABLE,MARKDOWN.

arguments.name: sourcepath
arguments.description:
Specifies source path to scan for NuGet dependencies, if 
not specified working direcory used.

options.name: --buildversion
options.description:
Specifies optional version of current
build.

commands.name: report

options.name: --buildversion
options.description:
Specifies optional version of current
build.

options.name: --sharedkey
options.description:
Specifies Azure Log Analytics shared key, defaults to
environment variable NuGetReportSettings_SharedKey.

options.name: --workspace
options.description:
Specifies Azure Log Analytics workspace id to log to,
defaults to environment variable NuGetReportSettings_WorkspaceId.

commands.description:
Inventories NuGet packages and reports to Azure Log 
Analytics
